name: Kitchen
description: You are in a kitchen that appears functional in a strictly technical sense. A table bears signs of recent food preparation, though nothing here suggests anyone lingered afterward. A passage leads west back toward the living room, while a dark staircase rises upward without commentary. A narrow chimney descends into shadow, and a small window to the east stands open, apparently left that way on purpose. On the table rests an elongated brown sack smelling strongly of hot peppers, beside a bottle containing water, placed with the quiet confidence of a default provision.
